hintDisplay: Sujeto: nosotros / Verbo: acampar (en futuro negativo) / Complemento: en este bosque / Complemento: sin permisos adecuados / Tiempo: nunca
spanishSentence: Nunca acamparemos en este bosque sin permisos adecuados.
correctSentence: Never will we camp in this forest without proper permits.

hintDisplay: Tiempo: regularmente (frecuencia de la acción) / Sujeto: el jardinero / Verbo: regar (acción principal) / Complemento: las plantas / Verbo: poder (habilidad/posibilidad) / Sujeto: las flores / Verbo: florecer / Complemento: hermosamente (adverbio de modo)

correctSentence: Only when the gardener waters the plants regularly can the flowers bloom beautifully.

correctSentence: Not once has the ranger monitored the forest for illegal activities.

correctSentence: Never before had the hiker observed such breathtaking mountain landscapes during a single journey through nature.

correctSentence: Only when the camper had finished fishing did he realize how peaceful nature truly was.
